function.name: bash
function.description: Execute a bash command. Set run_in_background=true for long-running commands (network requests, builds, heavy computation). When run_in_background is true, the result contains a task ID and output file path. Check the output file later with read_file. Do NOT immediately check background task outputs — let the user continue the conversation.

run_in_background.description: Set to true for long-running commands (network requests, builds, recursive searches). Defaults to false.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 120000 (2 minutes).
